title: Gorilla Contact Adhesive Clear 75g
features: REPOSITIONABLE: Holds in seconds but allows flexibility when positioning
100% WATERPROOF: Washer/dryer safe - ideal for fabrics
NO RUN FORMULA: For increased control
CRYSTAL CLEAR: Applies and dries clear - ideal for glass
PREPARATION: All surfaces must be clean and dry

APPLICATION: Apply adhesive to each surface to be bonded. Allow adhesive to partially dry. FOR MAXIMUM BOND STRENGTH: Wait approximately 2 minutes before joining surfaces. FOR REPOSITIONAL BONDS: Wait approximately 1 minute before joining surfaces. Repositionable for 2-4 minutes depending on surface type.

NOTE: Not recommended for use on polypropylene (PP), polyethylene (PE) or polystyrene (PS) plastics or any type of rubber with high oil or plasticizer content. Also not recommended for direct or indirect food contact and should not be considered food safe.
